common.offline: You are offline. Changes will sync once connected.

login.title: Welcome to Ekatva
login.tagline: The Digital Thread for Handloom Cooperatives
login.firebaseError: Email-password provider is not enabled in the Firebase Console. Please go to Firebase Console -> Authentication -> Sign-in method and enable 'Email/Password'. Alternatively, you can use the 'Login with Google' button below which is pre-configured and ready!
login.fail: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.demoFail: Failed to login with demo account.
login.note: Note: If accounts are not registered yet, please use the 'Register New Weaver' button below to test.

register.title: New Weaver Registration
register.tagline: Become a part of Ekatva Family

voice.instructions: Tap mic and speak. e.g. 'start job', 'need help'
voice.greeting: Hello! I am Job Sakhi. How can I help you today?
voice.unsupported: Your browser does not support voice. Please use Google Chrome or Safari.
voice.noMic: Microphone permission is not allowed. Please grant permission in settings.
voice.error: Error in recognizing voice. Please try again.

trace.title: Genuine Handloom Certificate
trace.tagline: From thread to hand - a tale of raw authenticity
trace.fairWageDesc: {percent}% of the price of this product goes directly to the artisan as wages.

schemes.title: Government Schemes Matchmaker
schemes.tagline: Discover government schemes based on cooperative metrics.
schemes.reasonProduction: Requires minimum annual production of {{required}} pieces, you have {{current}}.

ihb.name: India Handloom Brand (IHB)
ihb.description: Promotes high-quality handloom products with unique designs, authentic raw materials, and social compliance, giving weavers premium market access.
ihb.benefits: Premium branding, marketing assistance in domestic and international exhibitions, and direct buyer trust.

gem.name: GeM Registration for Handloom
gem.description: Facilitates direct online sale of handloom products to government departments, agencies, and public sector undertakings.
gem.benefits: Direct government procurement channels, automated matching with government tenders, and no intermediary transaction fees.

mudra.name: MUDRA Loan for Weavers
mudra.description: Provides easy and subsidized working capital and term loans to individual weavers and handloom cooperative organizations.
mudra.benefits: Subsidized loans up to ₹10 Lakhs, interest subvention of 6%, and margin money assistance up to ₹10,000.

nhdp.name: NHDP – Handloom Cluster Development
nhdp.description: National Handloom Development Programme to set up infrastructure and common facilities for weaver clusters.
nhdp.benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹2.00 Crore for Common Facility Centers (CFC), design studios, and specialized looms.

pm_vishwakarma.name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
pm_vishwakarma.description: Central scheme supporting traditional artisans with skill training, toolkit incentives, and subsidized credit.
pm_vishwakarma.benefits: ₹15,000 toolkit voucher, 5-day basic skill training with ₹500/day stipend, and interest-subsidized credit support up to ₹3,000,000.

ayush.name: AYUSH Handloom Export Scheme
ayush.description: Promotes international trade and export opportunities for certified handloom cooperatives.
ayush.benefits: Financial reimbursement for participating in international expos, buyer-seller meets, and duty exemptions on design software imports.

rfqOpportunities.title: Market Opportunities & Coalition Engine
rfqOpportunities.subtitle: Connect with wholesale buyers and form coalitions with other cooperatives to meet large bulk demands.
rfqOpportunities.noRfqsDesc: There are no active wholesale demands in the market right now. New buyer RFQs will appear here as soon as they are submitted.
rfqOpportunities.noCapacity: No available capacity for this deadline
rfqOpportunities.demandFilled: This demand has already been fully allocated
rfqOpportunities.joinModalSubtitle: Commit your production capacity to collectively fulfill the bulk buyer demand.
rfqOpportunities.treatySubtitle: Ekatva Collective Treaty of Handloom Cooperatives
rfqOpportunities.treatyPreamble: "We, the undersigned handloom cooperatives, hereby pledge our collective production capacities, skills, and looms to faithfully fulfill the bulk buyer demand specified in this contract."
rfqOpportunities.invalidQty: Please enter a valid committed quantity
rfqOpportunities.invalidPrice: Please enter a valid quoted price
rfqOpportunities.capacityLimitExceeded: Capacity Limit Exceeded! Your available capacity is only {{capacity}} units.
rfqOpportunities.joinFailed: Failed to join coalition. Please try again.
rfqOpportunities.confirmQuoteSubmit: Do you want to send this unified quotation to the buyer?
rfqOpportunities.quoteSubmitSuccess: Unified quotation successfully sent to the buyer!
rfqOpportunities.quoteSubmitError: Failed to submit quote to buyer. Please try again.

products.title: Cooperative Product Catalog
products.desc: List your fine handloom creations for direct visibility to global buyers and production assignment.
products.emptyDesc: Your cooperative doesn't have any products registered. Click the button below to register your first handloom handicraft.
products.addModalDesc: Present your textiles to global buyers with certified quality markers.
products.namePlaceholder: e.g., Royal Banarasi Silk Sari - Crimson Red
products.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the weaving technique, yarn thread count, and craft specifications...
products.artisanStoryPlaceholder: Tell the buyer about the weaver, their village, and their dedication to the craft...
products.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
products.defaultWeaverStory: This premium product is handwoven with pristine craftsmanship by one of our cooperative's skilled artisans.
products.addError: Error listing product. Please try again.
products.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to remove this product from the catalog?
